case_title: OSCAR RODRIGUEZ VS. KORINA MARIE LEALIIEE ET AL

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF RODRIGUEZ, OSCAR AS TO DEFENDANT LEALIIEE, KORINA MARIE MATANANE, VICTORIA DOES 1 TO 100 NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-02-2020 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-31-2020 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         NOV-09-2020
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR MAR-29-2021. THE MAR-03-2021 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE APR-08-2021.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 200022857) FILED BY DEFENDANT LEALIIEE, KORINA MARIE MATANANE, VICTORIA
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100143509) FILED BY PLAINTIFF RODRIGUEZ, OSCAR
PLAINTIFF(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR GAYLE L GOUGH.
ARBITRATOR RICHARD C. VALERIAN APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION APR-12-2021 THROUGH JUL-11-2021.
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF FEB-15-2022 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100115424) FILED BY PLAINTIFF RODRIGUEZ, OSCAR JURY DEMANDED
STIPULATION & [PROPOSED ORDER] TO CONTINUE ARBITRATION DEADLINE (TRANSACTION ID # 100134417) FILED BY DEFENDANT LEALIIEE, KORINA MARIE MATANANE, VICTORIA
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PARTIES TO BEAR THEIR OWN FEES AND COSTS. (TRANSACTION ID # 100147528)
ORDER TO CONTINUE ARBITRATION DEADLINE; STIPULATION
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1385 SET FOR FEB-15-2022 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. AUG-16-2021 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF RODRIGUEZ, OSCAR
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF DEC-02-2020 CONTINUED TO MAR-03-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION EXTENDED TO OCT-08-2021. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
